reasons: Evidence mentions occasional OTC naproxen 220 mg, not amiodarone 200 mg twice daily — the medication claim is invented and contradicts the note stating 'No medications'
Claim of fully resolved symptoms is unsupported; evidence only says naproxen 'helps' with 1-2 uses/week
Fabricated medication and outcome claims make placement irrelevant, but a new medication/symptom-status change would not be well-supported here
